title: sorbus arbutifolia
intro: Sorbus arbutifolia, also known as the Chinese rowan or mountain ash, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China and parts of Asia. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Sorbus arbutifolia include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Sorbus arbutifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
